title: Biscuit Gift Set Hamper – Bundle Bear Biscuit Hamper including 18 Snack Twin Packs – Border Biscuits, Shortbread & Individually Wrapped Cookies/Birthday Hampers for Women & Men (Gift)
features: Luxury Biscuit Gift Set – 18 individually wrapped packs (35 biscuits) including Border Biscuits, Walkers Shortbread, Bronte & Wheatleys for the perfect afternoon tea hamper.
Individually Wrapped Biscuits – hygienic single-serve packs ideal for sharing at home, office, break rooms, or gifting as a thank you hamper or box of biscuits.
Perfect Birthday Hampers for Women & Men – classic British biscuits & shortbread biscuits gift selection in a premium Bundle Bear sleeve (Happy Birthday or Just for You).
Premium Biscuit Hamper Variety – from golden oat & salted caramel to Viennese whirls, chocolate cookies & more – mini biscuits for every taste.
Ready-to-Gift Packaging – sustainable box & printed sleeve; ideal as a biscuit gift set, biscuits box, biscuit hampers gift baskets or afternoon tea gifts.
description: Enjoy a true taste of Britain with the Bundle Bear Biscuit Gift Set – a beautifully presented biscuit hamper packed with individually wrapped biscuits for freshness and convenience. Inside you’ll find 18 snack packs (35 biscuits) from premium brands such as Border Biscuits, Walkers, Bronte and Wheatleys. Each twin-pack or shortbread round is wrapped for perfect portion control, making this a superb box of biscuits to enjoy at home, at work or on the go. Our shortbread biscuits gift selection includes Walkers Shortbread Fingers and Rounds alongside Border favourites like Butterscotch Crunch, Golden Oat Crumbles, Viennese Whirls, Shortbread Rings and Chocolate Cookies. The mini biscuits and wrapped biscuits are ideal for offices, hospitality trays, travel or simply elevating your afternoon tea. Presented in a sturdy Bundle Bear gift box with a choice of printed sleeve (“Happy Birthday” or “Just for You”), this hamper doubles as a thank you hamper, gift hamper for women, or hamper for men. Whether you’re searching for birthday hampers for women, biscuit gifts, or an afternoon tea hamper, our biscuit gift set covers every occasion. Every Bundle Bear hamper is assembled with care in the UK using high-quality packaging. Biscuits are naturally suitable for vegetarians and all allergens are clearly labelled on the packs. Simply add a gift message at checkout for the perfect personal touch.
